locations.name: 玻利維亞
locations.summary: 玻利維亞多民族國（西班牙語：Estado Plurinacional de Bolivia），通稱玻利維亞，是位於南美洲中西部的內陸國家，與巴西、秘魯、智利、阿根廷、巴拉圭五國接壤，亦為南美洲國家聯盟的成員國；其法定首都為蘇克雷，但實際上…

locations.name: 秘鲁
locations.summary: 秘（bì）魯共和國（西班牙語：República del Perú；奇楚瓦語：Piruw Ripuwlika；艾馬拉語：Piruwxa Ripuwlika），通称秘魯（西班牙語：Perú；奇楚瓦語：Piruw；艾馬拉語：Piruw），是南…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Yungas tody-tyrant
relations.evidence: The Yungas tody-tyrant (Hemitriccus spodiops) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Bolivia and Peru.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Yungas tody-tyrant
relations.evidence: The Yungas tody-tyrant (Hemitriccus spodiops) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Bolivia and Peru.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Yungas tody-tyrant
relations.evidence: It inhabits the Yungas biome, where it occurs at the edges of humid montane forest, in mature secondary growth along roads and in openings caused by landslides, and in stands of bamboo
